sections.heading: 🚀 Join The Next Cohort — Only 5 Spots Remaining
sections.description: Stop leaving money on the table. Book your FREE strategy session today and get a personalized roadmap to 4x your ROAS in 90 days. No credit card required. Next cohort starts March 31st.

items.question: How secure is this? Can I trust you with sensitive brand data?
items.answer: 100% confidentiality guaranteed. We sign NDAs with every client. All data is encrypted and stored on secure servers. We have never had a data breach in 5+ years of operating.

items.question: What if it does not work for my specific brand?
items.answer: We work for free until we hit 2x ROAS. We are only profitable when you are profitable. No results = no payment. This is the most results-focused partnership you can get.

items.question: How long until I see real results?
items.answer: Week 1: First optimizations live. Weeks 2-4: Early wins (usually 20-30% improvement). By day 90: Full transformation (most clients see 2-4x ROAS). Some fast-movers hit 2x in month 1.

items.question: Do I need to have a big marketing budget?
items.answer: No. We work with brands spending $5K-$500K/month in ad spend. We help optimize regardless of budget size. The efficiency gains apply across the board.

items.question: What makes you different from other agencies?
items.answer: We are not a service agency — we are growth partners. We only take clients we can 10x. We invest time upfront. Your success is literally our success (results-only model).

items.question: How much does this cost?
items.answer: Starts at $5K/month for the 90-day program, with success fees tied to ROAS improvement. Founding members in this cohort get 30% off. If we do not hit 2x ROAS, you pay nothing.
